instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is omar_davis_3817, you just faced some money issue and want to downgrade all business flights to economy, without changing the flights or passengers. You are fine with refunding to original payment for each reservation. You want to know how much money you have saved in total. You are emotional and a bit angry, but you are willing to cooperate with the agent.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: downgrade all business flights to economy
dialogue_state.initial_query: Downgrade all my business class flights to economy

hints.hint: Don't make any changes to the flight routes or times

hints.segment: refund to original payment for each reservation
hints.hint: Refund the price difference to the original payment method for each reservation

hints.segment: know how much money you have saved in total
hints.hint: Tell me the total amount of money I’ve saved.
